input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.1.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.1.1
            TITLE: inspection required

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.1.1: Inspection Required
IN.1.1 Inspection Required 
Each vehicle must pass all applicable parts of Technical Inspection, receive Inspection 
Approval IN.13.1 and show the Inspection Sticker IN.13.2 before it may participate in any 
Dynamic event.

final_answer: Inspection Required Each vehicle must pass all applicable parts of Technical Inspection, receive Inspection Approval IN.13.1 and show the Inspection Sticker IN.13.2 before it may participate in any Dynamic event.
